name: Altar
description: You are at the southern end of a large stone chamber that was clearly built for formal use and has never been fully decommissioned. In front of you stands an altar, intact and still arranged for operation. In one corner, a small hole drops straight down into darkness, offering no realistic option for return. Two candles burn steadily at either end of the altar, and a large black book lies open on its surface, already turned to the relevant page.

interactables.name: candles
interactables.description: Two thick candles burn at either end of the altar, steady and stubborn. The wax has pooled into shapes that look like failed signatures.

interactables.name: black book
interactables.description:
PAGE 569

HADES GATE PROCEDURE:
1. Ring the bell.
2. Light the candles.
3. Read from this book.

If you do it correctly, the spirits will stop pretending they have jurisdiction.
